content:
# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

Implemented inline `family/model` panel backend specs by updating `PanelBackendSpec` parsing/rendering to preserve optional markers and carry model overrides into `BackendSelection.model`, adding backend-list validation in config writes so `config set` accepts and checks the new syntax before persisting, and adding regression tests for parse/display, JSON/TOML serde round-trip, config set/show behavior, and final-review override precedence. I also verified that panel resolution already honors `BackendSelection.model`, so no functional policy change was needed in `src/contexts/agent_execution/policy.rs` beyond that verification.

## Steps

1. [Completed] Updated `PanelBackendSpec` display and parsing to support `family/model` and `?family/model`, while keeping bare-family and existing `BackendSelection` fallback behavior intact.
2. [Completed] Extended config string-list handling to parse TOML array literals correctly and to validate panel backend list entries (`prompt_review.validator_backends`, `completion.backends`, `final_review.backends`) with the new inline model syntax before writing.
3. [Completed] Added regression coverage for panel backend parse/display behavior, JSON/TOML serde round-trip, config set/get rendering and invalid-write rejection, and final-review resolution preferring inline model overrides over role-model defaults.
4. [Completed] Ran requested validation commands: `cargo fmt --check` passed, `cargo test` passed, and the requested clippy command was attempted but remains blocked by unrelated pre-existing repo-wide warnings promoted to errors.

## Validation Evidence

- `cargo fmt --check` passed.
- `cargo test` passed.
- Verified by inspection that `BackendPolicyService::selection_to_target` forwards `selection.model.clone()` into `target_for_family`, so inline panel model overrides take precedence over `role_models` when present.
- New tests cover `PanelBackendSpec` parsing/display, JSON/TOML serde round-trip, `EffectiveConfig::set` acceptance/rejection for backend lists using inline model overrides, and final-review same-family reviewers with distinct inline models overriding configured role defaults.
- `cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings` was run and failed only on unrelated existing repo-wide issues, not on the newly added panel-backend override logic.

## Outstanding Risks

- `cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings` still fails on pre-existing repo-wide issues outside this change set, including dead code in `src/cli/run.rs`, multiple unrelated clippy findings in `src/adapters/fs.rs`, and existing `items_after_test_module` violations.
